_meta.gemini_test_intent: adb shell am start ... -e SET_GEMINI_KEY <key> ; then -e GEMINI_TEST 1 (key never logged/committed)
_meta.discipline: A1/A2 — real measured output only; no fabricated translations or latency. Values below are genuine logcat captures from the device.

gemini_flash_byok.credential_mode: OWN_KEY (BYOK, user-supplied ephemeral token, stored in EncryptedSharedPreferences, never logged/committed)
gemini_flash_byok.network: device network (no geo-block — direct generateContent succeeded)
gemini_flash_byok.notes: Real Gemini Flash translation on-device via the BYOK direct path. Confirms the online/cloud tier works end-to-end on this device's network (the same token is geo-blocked from the dev host in RU, so the device path / VPN is what makes it usable — exactly why backend-mediation + BYOK both exist).

translations.input: Я хочу заказать такси до аэропорта.
translations.output: I want to order a taxi to the airport.

m2m100_418m.notes: Real on-device offline MT. ~0.5-0.8s per sentence after the one-time ~38s load. Good conversational quality. Working offline (balanced) MT tier; AUTO routing uses it when offline / cloud unavailable.

milmmt_46_4b_q6.status: LOAD_FAILED — fix compiled, on-device re-run pending
milmmt_46_4b_q6.observed: llama.cpp model load returned 0 (no ggml backend registered) for all 6 test sentences; GGUF present on device and the JNI lib loads, but llama_model init returns null.
milmmt_46_4b_q6.root_cause: ggml-org b9453 splits ggml into separate backend shared libs (libggml-cpu-*.so) that must be registered before model load. ggml_backend_load_all() dlopen-by-SONAME fails on Android because the vendored libggml-cpu-*.so carry no embedded SONAME, so no CPU backend registers.
milmmt_46_4b_q6.fix: milmmt_jni.cpp now explicitly registers/loads the CPU backend before model load. The fix COMPILES (assembleDebug green); on-device verification pending a stable USB connection (the SM-S937B dropped before the rebuilt APK could be re-run).

asr.status: verified earlier (RU t-one): real transcription «сейчас к тебе приедет бригада давай» on this device; RTF not re-measured this run.

summary: Gemini Flash (online, BYOK) and M2M-100 (offline) both produce REAL correct translations on-device. MiLMMT-4B Q6 (premium offline quality) fails to load due to a llama.cpp b9453 ggml-backend registration issue on Android; a compiled fix awaits an on-device re-run. Offline-first + online-Gemini dialogue both function; MiLMMT is the one degraded path pending fix verification.
